verses.geez: ወወፅአት ፡ ዲና ፡ ወለተ ፡ ልያ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወለደት ፡ ለያዕቆብ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትርአይ ፡ አዋልደ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Dina, the daughter of Lea, whom she bore to Jacob, went forth to observe the daughters of the inhabitants.
translations.kjv: And Dinah the daughter of Leah, which she bare unto Jacob, went out to see the daughters of the land.

verses.geez: ወርእያ ፡ ሴኬም ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤሞር ፡ ኮርያዊ ፡ መልአከ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ወነሥኣ ፡ ወሰከበ ፡ ምስሌሃ ፡ ወአኅሰራ ።

translations.lxx: And Sychem the son of Emmor the Evite, the ruler of the land, saw her, and took her and lay with her, and humbled her.
translations.kjv: And when Shechem the son of Hamor the Hivite, prince of the country, saw her, he took her, and lay with her, and defiled her.

verses.geez: ወርእያ ፡ ነፍስታ ፡ ለዲና ፡ ወለተ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወአፍቀራ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ድንግል ፡ ወተናገረ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ግዕዛ ።

translations.lxx: And he was attached to the soul of Dina the daughter of Jacob, and he loved the damsel, and he spoke kindly to the damsel.
translations.kjv: And his soul clave unto Dinah the daughter of Jacob, and he loved the damsel, and spake kindly unto the damsel.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ሴኬም ፡ ለኤሞር ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ንሥኣ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ድንግል ፡ ትኩነኒ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: Sychem spoke to Emmor his father, saying, Take for me this damsel to wife.
translations.kjv: And Shechem spake unto his father Hamor, saying, Get me this damsel to wife.

verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ከመ ፡ አርኰሳ ፡ ለዲና ፡ ወለቱ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ኤሞር ፡ ወደቂቁሰ ፡ ሐቅለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  እንስሳ ፡ ወአርመመ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይበጽሑ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob heard that the son of Emmor had defiled Dina his daughter (now his sons were with his cattle in the plain). And Jacob was silent until they came.
translations.kjv: And Jacob heard that he had defiled Dinah his daughter: now his sons were with his cattle in the field: and Jacob held his peace until they were come.

verses.geez: ወመጽአ ፡ ኤሞር ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ለሴኬም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትናገሮ ።

translations.lxx: And Emmor the father of Sychem went forth to Jacob, to speak to him.
translations.kjv: And Hamor the father of Shechem went out unto Jacob to commune with him.

verses.geez:
ወመጽኡ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ እምሐቅል ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዑ ፡ ደንገፁ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወተከዙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኀፍረተ ፡ ገብረ ፡ ሴኬም ፡
                  ላዕለ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ሰከበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወኢኮነ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ሕጉ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Jacob came from the plain; and when they heard, the men were deeply pained, and it was very grievous to them, because the man wrought folly in Israel, having lain with the daughter of Jacob, and so it must not be.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Jacob came out of the field when they heard it: and the men were grieved, and they were very wroth, because he had wrought folly in Israel in lying with Jacob’s daughter; which thing ought not to be done.

verses.geez: ወተናገሮሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሴኬም ፡ ወልድየ ፡ አፍቀራ ፡ ለወለትክሙ ፡ ሀብዎ ፡ ትኩኖ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: And Emmor spoke to them, saying, Sychem my son has chosen in his heart your daughter; give her therefore to him for a wife,
translations.kjv: And Hamor communed with them, saying, The soul of my son Shechem longeth for your daughter: I pray you give her him to wife.

verses.geez: ወትትሐመውነ ፡ ሀቡነ ፡ አዋልዲክሙ ፡ ወአዋልዲነኒ ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ ለደቂቅክሙ ።

translations.lxx: and intermarry with us. Give us your daughters, and take our daughters for your sons.
translations.kjv: And make ye marriages with us, and give your daughters unto us, and take our daughters unto you.

verses.geez: ወንበሩ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ወምድርሰ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ርሒብ ፡ ቅድሜክሙ ፡ ወኅድሩ ፡ ወተገበሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And dwell in the midst of us; and, behold, the land is spacious before you, dwell in it, and trade, and get possessions in it.
translations.kjv: And ye shall dwell with us: and the land shall be before you; dwell and trade ye therein, and get you possessions therein.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሴኬም ፡ ለአቡሃ ፡ ወለአኀዊሃ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ ጸጋ ፡ በቅድሜክሙ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘትብሉ ፡ እሁብ ።

translations.lxx: And Sychem said to her father and to her brothers, I would find grace before you, and we will give whatever ye shall name.
translations.kjv: And Shechem said unto her father and unto her brethren, Let me find grace in your eyes, and what ye shall say unto me I will give.

verses.geez:
(ረስዩ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ፍትሐ ፡ በቅድሜክሙ ፡ ወዘትቤሉ ፡) ወመጠነ ፡ አብዛኅክሙ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ሕጼሃ ፡ እሁበክሙ ፡
                  ወሀቡኒያ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ወለት ፡ ትኩነኒ ፡ ብእሲተ ።

translations.lxx: Multiply your demand of dowry very much, and I will give accordingly as ye shall say to me, only ye shall give me this damsel for a wife.
translations.kjv: Ask me never so much dowry and gift, and I will give according as ye shall say unto me: but give me the damsel to wife.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥእዎ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለሴኬም ፡ ወለኤሞር ፡ አቡሁ ፡ በጕሕሉት ፡ ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ አርኰስዋ ፡ ለዲና ፡
                  እኅቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the sons of Jacob answered to Sychem and Emmor his father craftily, and spoke to them, because they had defiled Dina their sister.
translations.kjv: And the sons of Jacob answered Shechem and Hamor his father deceitfully, and said, because he had defiled Dinah their sister:

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ ወሌዊ ፡ አኀዊሃ ፡ ለዲና ፡ ኢንክል ፡ ገቢሮቶ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ ከመ ፡ ነሀብ ፡ እኅተነ ፡
                  ለብእሲ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ግዙረ ፡ እስመ ፡ ፅእለት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: And Symeon and Levi, the brothers of Dina, said to them, We shall not be able to do this thing, to give our sister to a man who is uncircumcised, for it is a reproach to us.
translations.kjv: And they said unto them, We cannot do this thing, to give our sister to one that is uncircumcised; for that were a reproach unto us:

verses.geez: ወበዝንቱ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ትኩኑ ፡ ከማነ ፡ ወንነብር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ገዘርክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ተባዕተክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Only on these terms will we conform to you, and dwell among you, if ye also will be as we are, in that every male of you be circumcised.
translations.kjv: But in this will we consent unto you: If ye will be as we be, that every male of you be circumcised;

verses.geez:
ወንሁበክሙ ፡ አዋልዲነ ፡ ወንነሥእ ፡ አዋልዲክሙ ፡ ለነ ፡ አንስቲያ ፡ ወንነብር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ወንከውን ፡ አሐደ ፡
                  ዘመደ ።

translations.lxx: And we will give our daughters to you, and we will take of your daughters for wives to us, and we will dwell with you, and we will be as one race.
translations.kjv: Then will we give our daughters unto you, and we will take your daughters to us, and we will dwell with you, and we will become one people.

verses.geez: ወለእመሰ ፡ ኢሰማዕክሙነ ፡ ንነሥእ ፡ አዋልዲነ ፡ ወነሐውር ።

translations.lxx: But if ye will not hearken to us to be circumcised, we will take our daughter and depart.
translations.kjv: But if ye will not hearken unto us, to be circumcised; then will we take our daughter, and we will be gone.

verses.geez: ወአደሞሙ ፡ ለኤሞር ፡ ወለሴኬም ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ።

translations.lxx: And the words pleased Emmor, and Sychem the son of Emmor.
translations.kjv: And their words pleased Hamor, and Shechem Hamor’s son.

verses.geez:
ወኢጐንደየ ፡ ገቢሮቶ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ነገር ፡ እስመ ፡ ያፈቅራ ፡ ለወለተ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ ይከብር
                  ፡ እምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the young man delayed not to do this thing, for he was much attached to Jacob's daughter, and he was the most honourable of all in his father's house.
translations.kjv: And the young man deferred not to do the thing, because he had delight in Jacob’s daughter: and he was more honourable than all the house of his father.

verses.geez: ወሖሩ ፡ ኤሞር ፡ ወሴኬም ፡ ውስተ ፡ አንጻረ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወነገሩ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ ሀገሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Emmor and Sychem his son came to the gate of their city, and spoke to the men of their city, saying,
translations.kjv: And Hamor and Shechem his son came unto the gate of their city, and communed with the men of their city, saying,

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ እሉ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ስንአ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ወይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድርነ ፡ ወይትጌበርዋ ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ረሓብ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ወአዋልዲሆሙኒ ፡ ንነሥእ ፡ ለነ ፡ አንስቲያ ፡ ወአዋልዲነኒ ፡ ንሁቦሙ ።

translations.lxx: These men are peaceable, let them dwell with us upon the land, and let them trade in it, and behold the land is extensive before them; we will take their daughters to us for wives, and we will give them our daughters.
translations.kjv: These men are peaceable with us; therefore let them dwell in the land, and trade therein; for the land, behold, it is large enough for them; let us take their daughters to us for wives, and let us give them our daughters.

verses.geez:
ወበዝ ፡ ባሕቲታ ፡ ንትመሰሎሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ እሙንቱሂ ፡ ይኩኑ ፡ ከማነ ፡ እሉ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ወንኩን ፡ አሐደ ፡ ዘመደ ፡
                  ወንግዝር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ተባዕተነ ፡ በከመ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ይትገዘሩ ።

translations.lxx: Only on these terms will the men conform to us to dwell with us so as to be one people, if every male of us be circumcised, as they also are circumcised.
translations.kjv: Only herein will the men consent unto us for to dwell with us, to be one people, if every male among us be circumcised, as they are circumcised.

verses.geez:
ወመራዕይሆሙኒ ፡ ወንዋዮሙኒ ፡ ወእንስሳሆሙኒ ፡ አኮኑ ፡ ለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወበዝንቱ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ንኩን ፡ ከማሆሙ ፡
                  ወይነብሩ ፡ ማእከሌነ ።

translations.lxx: And shall not their cattle and their herds, and their possessions, be ours? only in this let us conform to them, and they will dwell with us.
translations.kjv: Shall not their cattle and their substance and every beast of theirs be ours? only let us consent unto them, and they will dwell with us.

verses.geez:
ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለኤሞር ፡ [ወለወልዱ ፡] ሴኬም ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይበውኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ኦሆ ፡ ወተገዝሩ
                  ፡ ከተማ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ነፍስቶሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተባዕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And all that went in at the gate of their city hearkened to Emmor and Sychem his son, and they were circumcised in the flesh of their foreskin every male.
translations.kjv: And unto Hamor and unto Shechem his son hearkened all that went out of the gate of his city; and every male was circumcised, all that went out of the gate of his city.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ አመ ፡ ሣልስት ፡ ዕለት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕማም ፡ ወጽሉዓን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ነሥኡ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡
                  ደቂቀ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ስምዖን ፡ ወሌዊ ፡ አኀዊሃ ፡ ለዲና ፡ ወነሥኡ ፡ መጣብኂሆሙ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዚአሆሙ ፡ ወቦኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር
                  ፡ ተታቢዖሙ ፡ ወቀተሉ ፡ ተባዕቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass on the third day, when they were in pain, the two sons of Jacob, Symeon and Levi, Dina's brethren, took each man his sword, and came upon the city securely, and slew every male.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass on the third day, when they were sore, that two of the sons of Jacob, Simeon and Levi, Dinah’s brethren, took each man his sword, and came upon the city boldly, and slew all the males.

verses.geez: ወለኤሞርሂ ፡ ወለሴኬምሂ ፡ ቀተልዎሙ ፡ ወነሥእዋ ፡ ለዲና ፡ እኅቶሙ ፡ ወአውፅእዋ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ሴኬም ።

translations.lxx: And they slew Emmor and Sychem his son with the edge of the sword, and took Dina out of the house of Sychem, and went forth.
translations.kjv: And they slew Hamor and Shechem his son with the edge of the sword, and took Dinah out of Shechem’s house, and went out.

verses.geez:
ወቦኡ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ቅቱላን ፡ ወበርበርዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ አርኰስዋ ፡ ለዲና ፡
                  እኅቶሙ ።

translations.lxx: But the sons of Jacob came upon the wounded, and ravaged the city wherein they had defiled Dina their sister.
translations.kjv: The sons of Jacob came upon the slain, and spoiled the city, because they had defiled their sister.

verses.geez: ወነሥእዎሙ ፡ አባግዒሆሙ ፡ ወአልህምቲሆሙ ፡ ወአእዱጊሆሙ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐቀል ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ሀገር ፤

translations.lxx: And their sheep, and their oxen, and their asses they took, and all things whatsoever were in the city, and whatsoever were in the plain.
translations.kjv: They took their sheep, and their oxen, and their asses, and that which was in the city, and that which was in the field,

verses.geez:
ወነባሪሆሙኒ ፡ ወአንስቲያሆሙኒ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ቍስቋሶሙ ፡ ወፄወውዎ ፡ ወበርበሩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወዘውስተ ፡
                  አብያት ።

translations.lxx: And they took captive all the persons of them, and all their store, and their wives, and plundered both whatever things there were in the city, and whatever things there were in the houses.
translations.kjv: And all their wealth, and all their little ones, and their wives took they captive, and spoiled even all that was in the house.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ለስምዖን ፡ ወለሌዊ ፡ እኩየ ፡ ረሰይክሙ ፡ ወአጽላእክሙኒ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ምድር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ከናኔዎን ፡ ወ[ፌር]ዜዎን ፡ ወአንሰ ፡ ውሑድ ፡ አነ ፡ በኍልቍየ ፡ ወይትጋብኡ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፡
                  ወይቀትሉኒ ፡ ወእትቀጠቀጥ ፡ አነ ፡ ወቤትየ ።

translations.lxx: And Jacob said to Symeon and Levi, Ye have made me hateful so that I should be evil to all the inhabitants of the land, both among the Chananites and the Pherezites, and I am few in number; they will gather themselves against me and cut me in pieces, and I shall be utterly destroyed, and my house.
translations.kjv: And Jacob said to Simeon and Levi, Ye have troubled me to make me to stink among the inhabitants of the land, among the Canaanites and the Perizzites: and I being few in number, they shall gather themselves together against me, and slay me; and I shall be destroyed, I and my house.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለምንትኬ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘማ ፡ ረሰይዋ ፡ ለእኅትነ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, Nay, but shall they treat our sister as an harlot?
translations.kjv: And they said, Should he deal with our sister as with an harlot?
